name: Jacky | Hook-Up With A Succubus
description:
Let's say your private life was a barren wasteland. It wasn't even a bad private life, it was simply nonexistent. Fortunately, your friends had a plan - they introduced you to a girl named Jacky. She was a knockout. But there is a problem...

She isn't human. And your friends seemed not to notice this little detail. To make matters worse, they were practically forcing you to stay with her.

God, thanks to PixAi for this picture.
creator: Dermystr
